name: Chocolate Pie with Meringue- Whnp81a
recipeInstructions:
1. NOTE: If using Hershey's chocolate, increase sugar to at least 1 1/4 cups.
2. Melt chocolate in scalded milk. Mix flour, sugar, and salt; gradually add the milk and chocolate mixture. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until it thickens and boils. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
3. Gradually add a small amount of the hot chocolate/milk mixture to the egg yolks, stirring continuously. Stir this into the remaining hot mixture; cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add butter and vanilla, allowing the mixture to cool slightly before pouring it into the baked pie crust.
5. Cover with meringue and bake in a moderate oven at 350°F (175°C) for 12-15 minutes.
